Please Note:

- All the fees are non-refundable.
visa_types.processing_time:
The visa processing time is within 15 calendar days of the date of the lodging of an application at the Embassy. The application has to be admissible according to the article 19 of the Visa Code.
That period may be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is solely for Medical Treatment If during any portion of the visit the applicant intends to engage in business, or official duties he/she must refer to other relevant visa sections.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is solely for Medical Treatment If during any portion of the visit the applicant intends to engage in business, or official duties he/she must refer to other relevant visa sections.

## Visa Fees

[cze > tun > en > Table:Medical Treatment > Visa Fees 1]

Please Note:
- There is a service charge of 20 euros (Inclusive of VAT) levied per application over and above the visa fees for each applicants.
- All charges are to be paid in cash only in Tunisian Dinar.
- All the fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Medical Treatment Visa Checklist 
To download a form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Photo Specifications
For further details Click Here (https://www.icao.int/Security/mrtd/Downloads/Technical%20Reports/Annex_A-Photograph_Guidelines.pdf)
Please note that the Visa application Centre may not accept photographs that do not meet these specifications. In case photos are not meeting the requirements mentioned above Submission Officer might ask to provide updated / recent photos.

## Processing Time
The visa processing time is within 15 calendar days of the date of the lodging of an application at the Embassy. The application has to be admissible according to the article 19 of the Visa Code.
That period may be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.

## Download Forms
Forms listed below must be filled in completely in English language only and signed by the applicant only (except for minors, application form is to be filled in by parents).

English (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3CnUzuHnRADNeADxxp25rj/ef0eb956f17d56a297008429bc1ca9e8/English_application_form.pdf) Application Form
French (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3QrH45VzfZf8Atc61LiaYU/8d2ce1ff2a0edd91ecc0f2803cf511ed/French_application_form.pdf) Application Form
Arabic (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7vDuvKW62VJsPV3rLQyDH2/cd094bb63b1c7a27ecb3113ed8b1fbef/Arabic_application_form.pdf) Application Form
To download a form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- ress the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Short course or Exams visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for short course or write exams. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days 
A visa for a cultural visit is required if during any portion of your stay you intend to attend one or more cultural events. 
A sports visit visa is required if you intend to participate in sports competitions.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Short course or Exams visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for short course or write exams. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days 
A visa for a cultural visit is required if during any portion of your stay you intend to attend one or more cultural events. 
A sports visit visa is required if you intend to participate in sports competitions.

## Visa Fees

[cze > tun > en > Table:Tourism > Visa Fees 1]

Please Note:
There is a service charge of 67.8 TND (Inclusive of VAT) levied per application over and above the visa fees for each applicants. 
All charges are to be paid in cash only in Tunisian Dinar.
All the fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Others Visa Checklist 
To download a form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Photo Specifications
For further details Click Here (https://www.icao.int/Security/mrtd/Downloads/Technical%20Reports/Annex_A-Photograph_Guidelines.pdf)
Please note that the Visa application Centre may not accept photographs that do not meet these specifications. In case photos are not meeting the requirements mentioned above Submission Officer might ask to provide updated / recent photos.

## Processing Time
The visa processing time is within 15 calendar days of the date of the lodging of an application at the Embassy. The application has to be admissible according to the article 19 of the Visa Code.
That period may be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.

## Download Forms
Forms listed below must be filled in completely in English language only and signed by the applicant only (except for minors, application form is to be filled in by parents).

English (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3CnUzuHnRADNeADxxp25rj/ef0eb956f17d56a297008429bc1ca9e8/English_application_form.pdf) Application Form

- Click on the form link

OR

- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is solely for the purpose of leisure travel including vacationing, , sightseeing, visit to friends and/or relatives and other recreational activities. If during any portion of the visit the applicant intends to engage in business, or official duties he/she must refer to other relevant visa sections.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is solely for the purpose of leisure travel including vacationing, , sightseeing, visit to friends and/or relatives and other recreational activities. If during any portion of the visit the applicant intends to engage in business, or official duties he/she must refer to other relevant visa sections.

## Visa Fees

[cze > tun > en > Table:Tourism > Visa Fees 1]

Please Note:
There is a service charge of 67.8 TND (Inclusive of VAT) levied per application over and above the visa fees for each applicants. 
All charges are to be paid in cash only in Tunisian Dinar.
All the fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Tourist Visa Checklist 
To download a form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Photo Specifications
For further details Click Here (https://www.icao.int/Security/mrtd/Downloads/Technical%20Reports/Annex_A-Photograph_Guidelines.pdf)
Please note that the Visa application Centre may not accept photographs that do not meet these specifications. In case photos are not meeting the requirements mentioned above Submission Officer might ask to provide updated / recent photos.

## Processing Time
The visa processing time is within 15 calendar days of the date of the lodging of an application at the Embassy. The application has to be admissible according to the article 19 of the Visa Code.
That period may be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.

## Download Forms
Forms listed below must be filled in completely in English language only and signed by the applicant only (except for minors, application form is to be filled in by parents).

The visa processing time is within 15 calendar days of the date of the lodging of an application at the Embassy. The application has to be admissible according to the article 19 of the Visa Code.
That period may be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience.

## Download Forms
Forms listed below must be filled in completely in English language only and signed by the applicant only (except for minors, application form is to be filled in by parents).

English (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3CnUzuHnRADNeADxxp25rj/ef0eb956f17d56a297008429bc1ca9e8/English_application_form.pdf) Application Form
French (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3QrH45VzfZf8Atc61LiaYU/8d2ce1ff2a0edd91ecc0f2803cf511ed/French_application_form.pdf) Application Form
Arabic (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7vDuvKW62VJsPV3rLQyDH2/cd094bb63b1c7a27ecb3113ed8b1fbef/Arabic_application_form.pdf) Application Form
To download a form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- ress the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
